## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

```bash
# Command that triggers the bug
metabase-cli ...
```

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error output.

- Node.js version: (`node --version`)
